title: MONKEYPOX VACCINE LOCATOR - 211info
text: OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY MONKEYPOX VACCINE LOCATOR Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a locator tool for vaccination locations searchable by zip code. Website also has information on prevention, what to do if exposed, and what side effects to expect. It is best to check in with healthcare provider for more information on getting the monkeypox (mpox) vaccine. 500 Summer Street NE E-20 Salem, OR 973011097 Eligibility: -Individuals who have been identified by public health as a contact of someone with mpox -Individuals who have had close contact in the prior 2 weeks with someone with mpox -Individuals who are at greater risk of mpox infection -Laboratory workers who routinely perform mpox virus testing -Clinicians who have had a high-risk occupational exposure (e.g., examined mpox lesions, or collected mpox specimens without using recommended personal protective equipment) Hours: No standard hours Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for vaccine locations or more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Varies by testing location AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Vaccine Information * Mpox Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER REGULATION - PREADOPTION BIRTH RECORDS SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - INDIGENT IGNITION INTERLOCK DEVICE PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON HEALTH AUTHORITY
